title: olfersia piloselloides
intro: Olfersia piloselloides, also known as False Hairy Fleabane, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it beneficial for wound healing and skin issues. The plant's leaves and flowers can be consumed as a tea, applied topically, or used in infusions to alleviate digestive issues, respiratory problems, and to reduce fever. In herbal preparations, Olfersia piloselloides is often combined with other plants to enhance its medicinal properties and provide a broader range of health benefits.
